name: Golfzone Plus
about: Golfzone Plus is an indoor golf training facility located in Northridge, California, offering a range of services including practice bays, simulator play, and instructional programs. The venue provides flexible pricing options for range packages, hourly bay rentals, and memberships, catering to golfers of all skill levels. It features a PGA-certified teaching staff and is open seven days a week, making it accessible for regular practice and improvement. The facility also hosts special events, junior golf camps, and tournaments, creating a community-oriented environment for golf enthusiasts.
why_golfers_like_it: Flexible membership options with discounted hourly rates
Junior golf programs for youth development
Indoor range accessible seven days a week

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs as club rentals are not explicitly mentioned.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No outside food or drink is mentioned as being allowed, but BYOB policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a typical time for 18-hole simulator play, but weekly 18-hole discounts are available for members.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior golf camps, making it kid-friendly, though specific age restrictions are not provided.
